description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular body with a dark green armored shell and reinforced black undercarriage. It is equipped with four large, knobby off-road tires mounted on independent suspension arms, providing excellent ground clearance and maneuverability over rough terrain. The vehicle's exterior is constructed from what appears to be heavy-duty metal panels, with visible bolts and seams for added durability. The front end is slightly sloped and features subtle detailing, while the rear is more squared off, suggesting a utilitarian design. The wheels are attached to prominent suspension components, and the vehicle lacks visible windows or a traditional cabin, indicating it may be remotely operated or designed for rugged, unmanned tasks. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, optimized for stability and performance in challenging urban or off-road environments.
description: A rugged, dark green all-terrain vehicle with four large knobby tires, armored metal body, and exposed suspension for off-road use. Its angular, utilitarian design emphasizes durability and maneuverability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, wide stance, and exposed suspension arms with large off-road tires.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated body, high ground clearance, and the full profile of the suspension and tire tread.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back of the armored shell and the robust wheel assemblies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the vehicle's length, tire profile, and undercarriage details.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum traction on loose, uneven, or muddy surfaces, making them ideal for all-terrain use.
